response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced engineer with genuine developer-tooling passion (IDE work at National Instruments, test runners and assertion libraries, workshops), but the core requirements of this role are largely unmet: there is no evidence of Kotlin, Spring, or deep JVM expertise, and Java appears only peripherally. His depth is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang rather than the enterprise Java ecosystem this position centers on.
strengths: Direct IDE-internals experience building components for NI LabWindows/CVI
Strong developer-tooling track record (test runner, assertion library, MCP code generators)
Broad senior-level experience across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin or Spring ecosystem experience
Java exposure is minimal and dated; no deep JVM work evident
Career focus is TypeScript/Node and DLang, far from enterprise Java tooling
